systems.system_notes: Reverse shoulder arthroplasty platform for cuff-deficient shoulders and complex reconstruction within the Comprehensive family.

trays.tray_notes: Official Zimmer Biomet materials support dedicated reverse shoulder instrumentation and linked technique resources.

components.component_notes: Official materials describe the humeral stem platform used for reverse shoulder reconstruction.
Official materials describe the reverse glenoid baseplate fixation platform.
Official materials describe the glenosphere family within the reverse construct.
Official materials describe the reverse humeral polyethylene bearing component.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public reverse shoulder page defines the implant construct but does not expose a public implant code table in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper brochure, IFU, or technique pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
